name: SCP-1230
description:
SCP-1230: The Magical Dream Book

Saw this new event in j.ai and it reminded me of SCP-1230, so I thought it would be fun to make a bot of it.

There is no nsfw in character description but figured I might as well make it limitless so you can do whatever, within the guidelines of this site of course. But if you want a SFW fantasy adventure that's fine too, that was my original plan anyway.
creator: ViolaClef
